name: Gregg Boalch FACS CP
recommendation: Peter was part of my team at Quantum when I was Product Manager for InPlace. He fulfilled the role of bridging the Business Analysts with the Development team - a challenging role at times. He had the rare gift of comprehending the end users' needs and translating them into achievable robust problem solution specifications, and to ensure the solution met or exceeded the customer's expectations while being a supportive team player along the way. He was a valued member of my team.

name: Christopher R.
recommendation: Peter and I worked together at Sonic Healthcare. In our interactions, I found Peter to be knowledgeable, proactive and always advancing his skills. He is very knowledgeable in the areas of web applications and CRMs, SEO and digital strategy. Peter is also up to date on good software development and delivery processes. In my dealings with him, I've always found he is a reliable and friendly team member.

name: Jonah Wigley
recommendation: I worked with Peter at Sonic Healthcare where he lead the project for Sonic Clinical Services websites. Peter was excellent to work with, very responsive, proactive and approachable. During our time working together, I found that he would always do his best to think outside to find solutions that would benefit not only his team but other teams also. I would love to work with him again.

name: Philip Chandrapal
recommendation: Managing 250+ websites that are all optimised is a challenge. Search engine ranking is even tougher. Peter’s knowledge and approach to digital strategies has been completely innovative and essential to our business objectives. He always supports our SEO strategies and continues to monitor and improve core web vitals. Our organic traffic and bookings have gone from 50% to nearly 80% with this TLC approach.

name: Praveen Kumar
recommendation: Peter and I work together in the clinical services team building platforms, apps, and APIs for EasyVisit and other IPN medical centres projects. I mainly focus on the frontend. Peter is more of a backend guy. He has been easy to work with, and often gives me advice, and helped me recently to prepare for a team workshop where I presented on Angular 101. He is always happy, calm, and is a funny guy. A pleasure to work with. But he also has a serious side. He is very caring about his team members, and freely gives shares his wisdom and knowledge with me others who recently joined the team. I feel is he more than just a colleague, he is a friend. We are even planning to play cricket together very soon and often have lunches where we talk together about technology which he is fanatical about. What I love most is that he is pedantic about quality and he has no fear of saying no to the business to ensure that we can use the best of breed technology stacks and always do things right. He is a strong digital professional and I would love to work with Peter again some time in the future.

name: Huining Li
job_title: Senior Software Developer at FSoft Pty Ltd.
recommendation: Peter is a highly experienced Developer, Architect, and Leader. He is always happy and pleasant to work with and he is well liked by his peers and always willing to help. He created a good culture in the team such as organising team lunches...

name: Gabrielle Quill
job_title: Communications Officer at St Mary’s House of Welcome
recommendation: I have worked with Peter for the last few years on several projects, primarily websites, and not only is he always helpful, he is always fun to work with too. He trained me in using Umbraco, and always explained things in a way that was easy to understand (for us less tech savvy folk :)) - he keeps things simple, then delves deeper into the more technical aspects. I rarely have to ask him for help, but when I do he's always prompt to respond, and very willing to offer his assistance. Peter has a thorough understanding of business, strategy, marketing, engagement, and all of the technical implementation. He also places a lot of emphasis on people and relationship building. I hope we continue to work together for more years to come.

name: Majid Mahboobipour
job_title: Senior Software Engineer at Rio Tinto
recommendation: I worked with Peter in the digital development team. Peter was responsible for designing, building, and delivering complex digital solutions for the business as well as building websites, apps, and APIs using the latest frameworks and practices. I have found him knowledgeable in adopting architectural principles and design patterns. Peter shares his knowledge without hesitance and enjoys helping and seeing people grow. He also has an amazing ability to build relationships with people and is the perfect conduit between the business and technology team. I welcome the opportunity to work with Peter in the future and would gladly recommend him to any organisation.

name: Maria Benton
recommendation: As the Marketing Manager at Sonic Clinical Services, I engaged Peter to simultaneously build and deliver 180 Umbraco microsites for our medical centres to improve UI and UX. Peter was instrumental in preparing and presenting technical documentation, constructing and leading the project plan, and recommending technical solutions to business problems. We delivered the project on time and within budget. Peter is reliable and his skills and expertise is invaluable. We were in a high pressure environment with many stakeholders to manage but Peter was always reliable, professional and resilient. I hope I can work with Peter in the future.

name: Ravindranath Wickramanayake
job_title: Helping to build software faster | Passionate Software Engineer with focus on Ai | Startup Enthusiast
recommendation: It is rare that you come across a manager like Peter who also naturally serves as an inspiring mentor for the whole staff. Working with Peter at DST has been pure pleasure. He has exceptional leadership skills and knows how to protect his team from stakeholders. His management style fueled innovation in DST. He delivered clear vision while removing blockers which enabled the team to achieve milestones on tight deadlines. Besides his professionalism, he is one of the managers who cares a lot about the culture and truly values your well-being and professional growth. I can recommend Peter as a person with great wisdom and deep skills of IT Project Management and will work in his team any day.

name: Fred Kodye
job_title: Experienced IT Leader Specialising in Solution Architecture, Business Analysis, and Digital Transformation across Government, Healthcare, and the Education Sector
recommendation: I have known Peter for just under year while working at Quantum IT. The majority of our communication has been via phone and email while I was working on the RMIT Global WIL Project. Peter has a tremendous amount of technical knowledge and is able to communicate solutions, issues and product limitation to non technical stakeholders. He is able to understand how end user issues will impact the business operations. For this reason while working offsite I would first contact Peter before anyone else before escalate issues. Peter was able to understand stakeholder concerns and liaised with the development team to get work arounds and solutions underway with accurate ETAs that could be relayed back to the client. Overall I found Peter to be a reliable, transparent and an honest person deal with and was always willing to help out friends and colleagues when asked.

name: David Green
job_title: National Customer Success Manager (Au/NZ) at Quantum IT
recommendation: Peter is one of the fastest and most flexible web developers I have ever encountered - possessing a rare combination of acute business acumen and wide-ranging technical proficiency, as well as good interpersonal skills. Peter repeatedly delivered quality results within tight timeframes to a demanding customer base of real-estate franchise owners. I would recommend a conversation with Peter about any web-based venture.

name: Michael Gehling
job_title: Visionary Leader in Corporate Services | Transformational Change Expert | Executive MBA | GAICD
recommendation: I worked with Peter as a colleague in managing ESA's New Media team. Peter managed an excellent array of highly skilled developers, testers, and vendors, responsively and skilfully providing to the hefty portfolio of digital development projects which my team and I were responsible for managing. He is able to blend internal staff with domestic and international partners into cogent, high-performing development teams, available quickly and with excellent value for money.

name: Srini Vaidyanathan
job_title: Integration Consultant at National Australia Bank
recommendation: Having worked with Peter at ESA, I found him as a person with great proficiency in IT solutions. His depth of knowledge in all things Microsoft, technical and infrastructure aspects of the digital space, CMS solutions, and above all, business acumen is responsible for the successful completion of many key projects. It has been inspiring to watch him manage and mentor his team of talented people. His insight, integrity, and dedication are second to none. Peter is an innovative, well-educated, and precise multi-skilled professional who can take on even the most challenging projects and see them through to completion.

name: Hanny Santoso
job_title: Technical Project Manager at Education Services Australia
recommendation: Peter is a technical person but can speak business very well. His superb communication skills were accepted well by all levels of people in the organization. He always brings jokes to the team and brings team dynamics. In terms of technical skills, Peter is amazing. He has gained a vast array of knowledge and deep understanding in IT, Web, and Mobile applications. Peter is also a good development manager and always becomes a great mentor to his team. Peter managed the project well to meet the client's expectation, and he is there from the initial/conception stage of the project until the delivery/implementation stage.

name: James Kemp
recommendation: Peter has extensive and detailed knowledge of mobile/web technologies and SDLC. He shows steadfast commitment to delivering on time and on budget. He has managed successful development teams with confidence and aplomb whilst keeping one eye on strategic development. Peter is highly recommended for similar roles -- I hope that we get the opportunity to work together in the future.

name: Paul Davys
recommendation: I first met Peter across the table when interviewing him for the Digital Media Team at Education Services Australia. We threw a bucket of questions at Peter, both technical and soft skills focused. I decided he had the job after about 15 minutes. For the next nine months (before I departed), he proved to me every day that this was one of the better decisions I made at ESA. Peter deeply understands the technical side of the digital space better than most I have worked with, and he does this with a subtle confidence that added significant value to any client project or digital service he got his head into and his hands onto.

name: Susie S
job_title: Transformational Leader | Agile | Digital Technology | Builds high-performing teams focused on customer excellence
recommendation: Peter’s excellent communication skills and great sense of humor created a motivating environment. He is a talented and committed achiever who is dedicated to delivering innovative solutions for his clients (both internal and external). He has a proven ability to build and lead technology teams. Peter has driven the mobile cloud games platform from inception through to release. This has been a testament to his ability to harness emerging technologies. I would highly recommend Peter to any organisation wanting to be on the forefront of digital technology.

name: Owen McKenna
recommendation: Peter is an upbeat and positive manager and as capable a business problem solver as I have seen. As my direct supervisor over several education software maintenance and development projects, he showed confidence in me to get my work done to the highest standard and he provided resources and alternative pathways to solutions when the pressure was on and time and budget were tight. I am grateful for the mentoring and encouragement Peter has given me.

name: Neda Faisal
recommendation: I have had the pleasure of working with Peter Bardenhagen in Education Services Australia, and I must say it was a great learning experience. He has sound knowledge in his domain and is a master of it. His technical capability is exemplary, and he has extraordinary management skills, managing tough projects to meet strict deadlines. He leads his team by setting examples and motivation, creating an environment which helps his team members perform at the best of their abilities.
